title: Best BCA Data Analytics College in Noida | Galgotias University
content: BCA Data Analytics is a three year degree program that focuses in the area of Data Analytics and Business Modeling. It is intensive skill-oriented program with enough practical training for building models for data analytics. With analysis and statistical approach, data analytics is one of the fastest growing career opportunities in the country. The course curriculum is designed to give exposure to the variety of applications that can be built using techniques covered under this program. The primary objective of this program is to provide instruction for enrolled students about current and emerging Big Data-related techniques and theories, including statistics, data mining, data storage, and data visualization. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list 01 02 Analyze and synthesis computing systems through quantitative and qualitative techniques. 03 04 05 06 To Develop practical skills to provide solutions to industry, society and business. 07 Understand environmental issues and lead a life with concerns for environment. 08 09 10 Communicate effectively in both verbal and written form. 11 12 01 02 03 Undertake higher education at institutions of transnational reputation. 01 02 Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list
